ast.source: The provided abstract file is not a file

ast.name: setButtonText
ast.target: 立即获取高级版 – 免费！

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter the endpoint URL for your S3-compatible storage.
ast.target: 输入您的 S3 兼容存储的端点 URL。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter the region for your S3-compatible storage.
ast.target: 输入您的 S3 兼容存储的区域。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 输入您的 S3 访问密钥。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 输入您的 S3 秘密密钥。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 输入您的 S3 存储桶名称。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter the base URL for constructing full object URLs.
ast.target: 输入用于构建完整对象 URL 的基础 URL。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Test the connection to your S3-compatible storage.
ast.target: 测试到您的 S3 兼容存储的连接。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Optional proxy for image loading - speed may vary
ast.target: 用于图像加载的可选代理 - 速度可能有所不同

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select folders to monitor. All attachments in these folders will be uploaded.
ast.target: 选择要监视的文件夹。这些文件夹中的所有附件都将被上传。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, attachments in all subfolders of the selected folders will be monitored. If disabled, only attachments in the selected folders will be monitored.
ast.target: 启用后，将监视所选文件夹的所有子文件夹中的附件。如果禁用，则仅监视所选文件夹中的附件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If turned off, you can manually upload attachments with one click through the command panel by "Cloud Storage: Upload attachments from the monitored folder" or "Cloud Storage: Upload attachments in current file".
ast.target: 如果关闭，您可以通过命令面板一键手动上传附件，使用“云存储：从监视的文件夹上传附件”或“云存储：上传当前文件中的附件”。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set the maximum file size for uploads. Files larger than this will be ignored.Maximum file size upload for non-members is 5MB
ast.target: 设置上传的最大文件大小。大于此大小的文件将被忽略。非会员的最大文件上传大小为 5MB

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Disable this option if you prefer fewer notifications
ast.target: 如果您希望减少通知，请禁用此选项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select how to handle local files after successful cloud upload.
ast.target: 选择云上传成功后如何处理本地文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Specify the folder where uploaded attachments will be moved.
ast.target: 指定上传附件将被移动到的文件夹。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose between blacklist and whitelist for file extensions
ast.target: 选择文件扩展名的黑名单或白名单模式。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter file extensions separated by commas (e.g., jpg,png,pdf)
ast.target: 输入文件扩展名，用逗号分隔（例如：jpg,png,pdf）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Rename files when uploading to ensure uniqueness and avoid overwriting
ast.target: 上传时重命名文件以确保唯一性并避免覆盖。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose between plugin-provided storage or custom S3-compatible storage.
ast.target: 选择插件提供的存储或自定义S3兼容存储。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Manage your storage space and uploaded files
ast.target: 管理您的存储空间和已上传的文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Email not verified. Verify your email to receive an additional 512 MB of storage.
ast.target: 邮箱未验证。验证您的邮箱可额外获得512 MB存储空间。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Reset your password if you have forgotten it.
ast.target: 如果您忘记了密码，请重置您的密码。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Maximum File Size For Automatic Uploads (MB)
ast.target: 自动上传的最大文件大小 (MB)

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 上传后本地文件处理方式

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Recovery did not find matching data. You can register as a new account.
ast.target: 恢复未找到匹配数据。您可以注册一个新账户。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: userAgentAppId must be a string or undefined.

ast.name: warn
ast.source: The provided userAgentAppId exceeds the maximum length of 50 characters.
ast.target: 提供的userAgentAppId超过了50个字符的最大长度。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: An error was encountered in a non-retryable streaming request.
ast.target: 在不可重试的流式请求中遇到错误。

ast.name: description
ast.source: AWS SDK for JavaScript S3 Client for Node.js, Browser and React Native
ast.target: 适用于 Node.js、浏览器和 React Native 的 AWS SDK for JavaScript S3 客户端

ast.name: error
ast.source: Accelerate cannot be used with FIPS
ast.target: 加速功能不能与 FIPS 一起使用

ast.name: error
ast.source: Cannot set dual-stack in combination with a custom endpoint.
ast.target: 不能将双栈与自定义端点组合使用。

ast.name: error
ast.source: A custom endpoint cannot be combined with FIPS
ast.target: 自定义端点不能与 FIPS 组合使用

ast.name: error
ast.source: A custom endpoint cannot be combined with S3 Accelerate
ast.target: 自定义端点不能与 S3 加速功能组合使用

ast.name: error
ast.source: S3Express does not support S3 Accelerate.
ast.target: S3Express 不支持 S3 加速功能。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Unrecognized hardware type: "Expected hardware type o or e but got {hardwareType}"
ast.target: 无法识别的硬件类型：“期望硬件类型为 o 或 e，但得到 {hardwareType}”

ast.name: error
ast.source: Invalid ARN: The outpost Id must only contain a-z, A-Z, 0-9 and `-`.
ast.target: 无效的 ARN：Outpost ID 只能包含 a-z、A-Z、0-9 和 `-`。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Custom endpoint `{Endpoint}` was not a valid URI
ast.target: 自定义端点 `{Endpoint}` 不是有效的 URI

ast.name: error
ast.source: S3 Accelerate cannot be used in this region
ast.target: S3 加速功能不能在此区域使用

ast.name: error
ast.target: 无效的 ARN：缺少账户 ID

ast.name: error
ast.source: Invalid ARN: bucket ARN is missing a region
ast.target: 无效的 ARN：存储桶 ARN 缺少区域

ast.name: error
ast.source: Invalid ARN: Object Lambda ARNs only support `accesspoint` arn types, but found: `{arnType}`
ast.target: 无效的 ARN：对象 Lambda ARN 仅支持 `accesspoint` ARN 类型，但找到：`{arnType}`

ast.name: error
ast.source: Access Points do not support S3 Accelerate
ast.target: 接入点不支持 S3 加速功能

ast.name: error
ast.source: Invalid ARN: The ARN was not for the S3 service, found: {bucketArn#service}
ast.target: 无效的 ARN：该 ARN 不属于 S3 服务，找到：{bucketArn#service}

ast.name: error
ast.source: S3 MRAP does not support dual-stack

ast.name: error
ast.source: S3 MRAP does not support FIPS

ast.name: error
ast.source: S3 MRAP does not support S3 Accelerate
ast.target: S3 MRAP 不支持 S3 加速功能

ast.name: error
ast.source: Invalid configuration: Multi-Region Access Point ARNs are disabled.
ast.target: 无效配置：多区域接入点 ARN 已被禁用。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Client was configured for partition `{mrapPartition#name}` but bucket referred to partition `{bucketArn#partition}`
ast.target: 客户端配置为分区 `{mrapPartition#name}`，但存储桶指向分区 `{bucketArn#partition}`

ast.name: error
ast.source: S3 Outposts does not support Dual-stack

ast.name: error
ast.source: S3 Outposts does not support FIPS

ast.name: error
ast.source: S3 Outposts does not support S3 Accelerate
ast.target: S3 Outposts 不支持 S3 加速功能

ast.name: error
ast.source: Invalid Arn: Outpost Access Point ARN contains sub resources
ast.target: 无效的 ARN：Outpost 接入点 ARN 包含子资源

ast.name: error
ast.target: 期望 Outpost 类型为 `accesspoint`，但找到 {outpostType}

ast.name: error
ast.source: Invalid ARN: expected an access point name
ast.target: 无效的 ARN：期望一个接入点名称

ast.name: error
ast.target: 无效的 ARN：期望一个包含 4 个组件的资源

ast.name: error
ast.source: Invalid ARN: The outpost Id may only contain a-z, A-Z, 0-9 and `-`. Found: `{outpostId}`
ast.target: 无效的 ARN：Outpost ID 只能包含 a-z、A-Z、0-9 和 `-`。找到：`{outpostId}`

ast.name: error
ast.source: Invalid ARN: The Outpost Id was not set
ast.target: 无效的 ARN：未设置 Outpost ID

ast.name: error
ast.target: 无效的 ARN：无法识别的格式：{Bucket}（类型：{arnType}）

ast.name: error
ast.source: Invalid ARN: No ARN type specified
ast.target: 无效的 ARN：未指定 ARN 类型

ast.name: error
ast.source: Invalid ARN: `{Bucket}` was not a valid ARN
ast.target: 无效的 ARN：`{Bucket}` 不是有效的 ARN

ast.name: error
ast.source: Path-style addressing cannot be used with ARN buckets
ast.target: 路径样式寻址不能与 ARN 存储桶一起使用

ast.name: error
ast.source: Path-style addressing cannot be used with S3 Accelerate
ast.target: 路径样式寻址不能与 S3 加速功能一起使用

ast.name: error
ast.source: A region must be set when sending requests to S3.
ast.target: 向 S3 发送请求时必须设置区域。

ast.name: name
ast.target: AWS SDK for JavaScript 团队

ast.name: name
ast.source: Upload attachments from the monitored folder
ast.target: 上传监控文件夹中的附件

ast.name: name
ast.target: 上传当前文件中的附件

ast.name: text
ast.source: Please select the region closest to you for optimal upload and download speeds.
ast.target: 请选择离您最近的区域，以获得最佳的上传和下载速度。

ast.name: text
ast.source: If you have previously used OBCS and need to restore access to your cloud files, choose "Recover my data".
ast.target: 如果您之前使用过 OBCS 并需要恢复对云文件的访问权限，请选择“恢复我的数据”。

ast.name: text
ast.source: 1. The email address may be incorrect
ast.target: 1. 电子邮件地址可能不正确

ast.name: text
ast.source: 2. Your account needs to be restored (e.g., after a system update or migration)
ast.target: 2. 您的账户需要恢复（例如，在系统更新或迁移后）

ast.name: text
ast.source: If you are sure this email is correct and you have used OBCS before, we can scan your vault to help restore your data.
ast.target: 如果您确定此电子邮件地址正确且之前使用过 OBCS，我们可以扫描您的保险库以帮助恢复您的数据。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Warning: After changing your email, you will be automatically logged out and need to log in again.
ast.target: 警告：更改电子邮件后，您将自动退出登录，需要重新登录。

ast.name: text
ast.source: This tool scans your vault for existing OBCS cloud links and helps restore access to your files. The process is safe and will not modify your current vault files.
ast.target: 此工具会扫描您的保险库，查找现有的 OBCS 云链接，并帮助恢复对您文件的访问权限。此过程安全，不会修改您当前的保险库文件。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Click the button below to start scanning your vault.
ast.target: 点击下方按钮开始扫描您的保险库。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Below are the accounts found from your vault links. Use the toggle to select which accounts to recover. The email on the right is the target account where your data will be restored — you can modify it if needed.
ast.target: 以下是从您的保险库链接中找到的账户。使用开关选择要恢复的账户。右侧的电子邮件是您的数据将恢复到的目标账户——如果需要，您可以修改它。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Note: These features are only available to subscribed members.
ast.target: 注意：这些功能仅对订阅会员开放。

ast.name: text
ast.source: If you have any questions or need support, please contact us at: support@antmight.com
ast.target: 如果您有任何问题或需要支持，请通过以下方式联系我们：support@antmight.com
